items.title: DCP: Addressing Input Dynamism In Long-Context Training via Dynamic Context Parallelism.
items.abstract: Context parallelism has emerged as a key technique to support long-context training, a growing trend in generative AI for modern large models. However, existing context parallel methods rely on static parallelization configurations that overlook the dynamic nature of training data, specifically, the variability in sequence lengths and token relationships (i.e., attention patterns) across samples. As a result, these methods often suffer from unnecessary communication overhead and imbalanced computation. In this paper, we present DCP, a dynamic context parallel training framework that introduces fine-grained blockwise partitioning of both data and computation. By enabling flexible mapping of data and computation blocks to devices, DCP can adapt to varying sequence characteristics, effectively reducing communication and improving memory and computation balance. Micro-benchmarks demonstrate that DCP accelerates attention by 1.19x~2.45x under causal masks and 2.15x~3.77x under sparse attention patterns. Additionally, we observe up to 0.94x~1.16x end-to-end training speed-up for causal masks, and 1.00x~1.46x for sparse masks.
items.abstract_zh: 上下文并行性已成为支持长上下文训练的关键技术，长上下文训练是现代大型模型的生成人工智能的增长趋势。然而，现有的上下文并行方法依赖于静态并行化配置，忽略了训练数据的动态性质，特别是样本之间序列长度和标记关系（即注意力模式）的可变性。因此，这些方法经常遭受不必要的通信开销和不平衡的计算。在本文中，我们提出了 DCP，一种动态上下文并行训练框架，它引入了数据和计算的细粒度分块分区。通过实现数据和计算块到设备的灵活映射，DCP可以适应不同的序列特征，有效减少通信并改善内存和计算平衡。微基准测试表明，DCP 在因果掩模下将注意力加速了 1.19 倍~2.45 倍，在稀疏注意力模式下加速了 2.15 倍~3.77 倍。此外，我们观察到因果掩码的端到端训练加速高达 0.94 倍~1.16 倍，稀疏掩码的端到端训练加速为 1.00 倍~1.46 倍。

items.title: Fast End-to-End Performance Simulation of Accelerated Hardware-Software Stacks.
eBPF Misbehavior Detection: Fuzzing with a Specification-Based Oracle.
items.abstract: Bugs in the Linux eBPF verifier may cause it to mistakenly accept unsafe eBPF programs or reject safe ones, causing either security or usability issues. While prior works on fuzzing the eBPF verifier have been effective, their bug oracles only hint at the existence of bugs indirectly (e.g., when a memory error occurs in downstream execution) instead of showing the root cause, confining them to uncover a narrow range of security bugs only with no detection of usability issues.
items.abstract_zh: Linux eBPF 验证器中的错误可能会导致其错误地接受不安全的 eBPF 程序或拒绝安全的程序，从而导致安全或可用性问题。虽然之前对 eBPF 验证器进行模糊测试的工作很有效，但他们的 bug 预言只是间接暗示 bug 的存在（例如，当下游执行中发生内存错误时），而不是显示根本原因，从而限制了他们仅发现一小部分安全 bug，而没有检测到可用性问题。

items.title: Aeolia: A Fast and Secure Userspace Interrupt-Based Storage Stack.
items.abstract: Polling-based userspace storage stacks achieve great I/O performance. However, they cannot efficiently and securely share disks and CPUs among multiple tasks. In contrast, interrupt-based kernel stacks inherently suffer from subpar I/O performance but achieve advantages in resource sharing.
items.abstract_zh: 基于轮询的用户空间存储堆栈实现了出色的 I/O 性能。但是，它们无法在多个任务之间高效、安全地共享磁盘和 CPU。相比之下，基于中断的内核堆栈本质上会受到 I/O 性能不佳的影响，但在资源共享方面具有优势。

items.title: Managing Scalable Direct Storage Accesses for GPUs with GoFS.
items.abstract: As we shift from CPU-centric computing to GPU-accelerated computing for supporting intelligent data processing at scale, the storage bottleneck has been exacerbated. To bypass the host CPUand alleviate unnecessary data movements, modern GPUs enable direct storage access to SSDs (i.e., GPUDirect Storage). However, current GPUDirect Storage solutions still rely on the host file system to manage the storage device, direct storage accesses are still bottlenecked by the host.
items.abstract_zh: 随着我们从以 CPU 为中心的计算转向以 GPU 加速的计算来支持大规模智能数据处理，存储瓶颈已经加剧。为了绕过主机 CPU 并减少不必要的数据移动，现代 GPU 启用了对 SSD 的直接存储访问（即 GPU 直接存储）。然而，目前的GPUDirect Storage解决方案仍然依赖主机文件系统来管理存储设备，直接存储访问仍然受到主机的瓶颈。

items.title: Fawkes: Finding Data Durability Bugs in DBMSs via Recovered Data State Verification.
items.abstract: Data durability is a fundamental requirement in DBMSs, ensuring that committed data remains intact despite unexpected faults such as power failures. Despite its critical importance, implementations of durability and recovery mechanisms continue to exhibit flaws, leading to severe issues(e.g., data loss, data inconsistency), which we refer to as Data Durability Bugs (DDBs). However, there is a limited understanding of the characteristics and root causes of DDBs. Furthermore, existing testing methods(e.g., Mallory) are often inadequate for detecting DDBs, particularly those that cause data loss or data inconsistency following DBMS failures.
items.abstract_zh: 数据持久性是 DBMS 的基本要求，确保提交的数据在出现意外故障（例如电源故障）时保持完整。尽管其至关重要，但持久性和恢复机制的实现仍然存在缺陷，导致严重的问题（例如数据丢失、数据不一致），我们将其称为数据持久性错误（DDB）。然而，人们对 DDB 的特征和根本原因了解有限。此外，现有的测试方法（例如 Mallory）通常不足以检测 DDB，特别是那些在 DBMS 故障后导致数据丢失或数据不一致的方法。

items.title: CHERIoT RTOS: An OS for Fine-Grained Memory-Safe Compartments on Low-Cost Embedded Devices.
items.abstract: Embedded systems do not benefit from strong memory protection, because they are designed to minimize cost. At the same time, there is increasing pressure to connect embedded devices to the internet, where their vulnerable nature makes them routinely subject to compromise. This fundamental tension leads to the current status-quo where exploitable devices put individuals and critical infrastructure at risk.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式系统无法从强大的内存保护中受益，因为它们的设计目的是最大限度地降低成本。与此同时，将嵌入式设备连接到互联网的压力越来越大，它们的脆弱性使它们经常受到损害。这种根本性的紧张局势导致了当前的现状，可利用的设备使个人和关键基础设施面临风险。

items.title: ORQ: Complex Analytics on Private Data with Strong Security Guarantees.
items.abstract: We present Orq, a system that enables collaborative analysis of large private datasets using cryptographically secure multi-party computation (MPC). Orq protects data against semi-honest or malicious parties and can efficiently evaluate relational queries with multi-way joins and aggregations that have been considered notoriously expensive under MPC. To do so, Orq eliminates the quadratic cost of secure joins by leveraging the fact that, in practice, the structure of many real queries allows us to join records and apply the aggregations "on the fly" while keeping the result size bounded. On the system side, Orq contributes generic oblivious operators, a data-parallel vectorized query engine, a communication layer that amortizes MPC network costs, and a dataflow API for expressing relational analytics—all built from the ground up.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Orq，这是一个能够使用加密安全多方计算 (MPC) 对大型私有数据集进行协作分析的系统。 Orq 可以保护数据免受半诚实或恶意方的侵害，并且可以通过多路联接和聚合有效地评估关系查询，而这些在 MPC 下被认为是非常昂贵的。为此，Orq 利用以下事实消除了安全连接的二次成本：在实践中，许多实际查询的结构允许我们“动态”连接记录并应用聚合，同时保持结果大小有限。在系统方面，Orq 提供了通用的不经意运算符、数据并行矢量化查询引擎、分摊 MPC 网络成本的通信层以及用于表达关系分析的数据流 API，所有这些都是从头开始构建的。

items.title: The Design and Implementation of a Virtual Firmware Monitor.
items.abstract: Low level software is often granted high privilege, yet this need not be the case. Although vendor firmware plays a critical role in the operation and management of the machine, most of its functionality does not require unfettered access to security critical software and data. In this paper we demonstrate that vendor firmware can be safely and efficiently deprivileged, decoupling its functionality from isolation enforcement.We introduce a new class of systems, called virtual firmware monitors, that run unmodified vendor firmware in userspace through software-based virtualization of the highest privilege mode of the application CPU. We describe the implementation of Miralis, a RISC-V virtual firmware monitor, and develop three security policies to protect the OS, enclaves, and confidential VMs from malicious firmware. We verify key components of Miralis, such as instruction emulation and memory protection, through exhaustive symbolic execution. Finally, we demonstrate that Miralis can effectively virtualize unmodified vendor firmware for two hardware platforms with no performance degradation compared to native execution.
items.abstract_zh: 低级软件通常被授予高权限，但情况并非如此。尽管供应商固件在机器的操作和管理中发挥着关键作用，但其大部分功能并不需要不受限制地访问安全关键软件和数据。在本文中，我们演示了可以安全有效地剥夺供应商固件的特权，将其功能与隔离执行解耦。我们引入了一类新的系统，称为虚拟固件监视器，它通过应用程序 CPU 最高特权模式的基于软件的虚拟化在用户空间中运行未经修改的供应商固件。我们描述了 Miralis（一种 RISC-V 虚拟固件监视器）的实现，并开发了三种安全策略来保护操作系统、飞地和机密虚拟机免受恶意固件的侵害。我们通过详尽的符号执行来验证 Miralis 的关键组件，例如指令模拟和内存保护。最后，我们证明 Miralis 可以有效地虚拟化两个硬件平台的未修改的供应商固件，与本机执行相比，性能不会下降。

items.title: Atmosphere: Practical Verified Kernels with Rust and Verus.
items.abstract: Recent advances in programming languages and automated formal reasoning have changed the balance between the complexity and practicality of developing formally verified systems. Our work leverages Verus, a new verifier for Rust that combines ideas of linear types, permissioned reasoning, and automated verification based on satisfiability modulo theories (SMT), for the development of a formally verified microkernel, Atmosphere.
items.abstract_zh: 编程语言和自动形式推理的最新进展改变了开发形式验证系统的复杂性和实用性之间的平衡。我们的工作利用 Verus，一种新的 Rust 验证器，它结合了线性类型、许可推理和基于可满足性模理论 (SMT) 的自动验证的思想，用于开发正式验证的微内核 Atmosphere。

items.title: Characterizing Mobile SoC for Accelerating Heterogeneous LLM Inference.
items.abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence technologies such as ChatGPT, AI agents, and video generation, contemporary mobile systems have begun integrating these AI capabilities on local devices to enhance privacy and reduce response latency. To meet the computational demands of AI tasks, current mobile SoCs are equipped with diverse AI accelerators, including GPUs and Neural Processing Units (NPUs). However, there has not been a comprehensive characterization of these heterogeneous processors, and existing designs typically only leverage a single AI accelerator for LLM inference, leading to suboptimal use of computational resources and memory bandwidth.
items.abstract_zh: 随着ChatGPT、AI代理和视频生成等人工智能技术的快速发展，当代移动系统已经开始将这些AI功能集成到本地设备上，以增强隐私并减少响应延迟。为了满足AI任务的计算需求，当前的移动SoC配备了多种AI加速器，包括GPU和神经处理单元（NPU）。然而，这些异构处理器尚未得到全面的表征，并且现有设计通常仅利用单个 AI 加速器进行 LLM 推理，导致计算资源和内存带宽的使用不理想。

items.title: Rearchitecting the Thread Model of In-Memory Key-Value Stores with μTPS.
items.abstract: This paper presents μTPS, a new thread architecture tailored for in-memory key-value stores (KVSs) that operate at tens of millions of operations per second. We show through analysis and demonstration that the widely used run-to-completion thread architecture, which executes monolithic functions from start to finish, often suffers from cache inefficiencies and contention issues. To address this, we revisit the once widely used thread-per-stage (TPS) architecture, but with a fresh perspective – separating cache-resident, contention-free stages and memory-resident, conflict-prone stages into distinct thread pools, and scheduling them with dedicated hardware resources (e.g., CPU cores, cache ways). This novel division enables independent optimization of each stage, significantly improving cache efficiency and mitigating contention. Additionally, μTPS incorporates reconfigurable RPC, resizable caching, and an auto-tuner to enhance its schedulability and performance. We implement two in-memory key-value stores, μTPS-H and μTPS-T, to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. Evaluation results show that μTPS achieves higher performance than the run-to-completion counterparts.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 μTPS，这是一种专为内存中键值存储 (KVS) 量身定制的新线程架构，每秒可进行数千万次操作。我们通过分析和演示表明，广泛使用的运行到完成线程架构（从头到尾执行整体函数）经常遭受缓存效率低下和争用问题。为了解决这个问题，我们重新审视曾经广泛使用的每阶段线程 (TPS) 架构，但采用了全新的视角——将驻留在缓存、无争用的阶段和驻留在内存、易发生冲突的阶段分离到不同的线程池中，并使用专用硬件资源（例如 CPU 核心、缓存通道）来调度它们。这种新颖的划分可以实现每个阶段的独立优化，从而显着提高缓存效率并减少争用。此外，μTPS 还结合了可重新配置的 RPC、可调整大小的缓存和自动调节器，以增强其可调度性和性能。我们实现了两个内存中键值存储：μTPS-H 和μTPS-T，以证明这种方法的有效性。评估结果表明，μTPS 比运行到完成的同类产品实现了更高的性能。

items.title: KTransformers: Unleashing the Full Potential of CPU/GPU Hybrid Inference for MoE Models.
items.abstract: Due to the sparse nature of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, they are particularly suitable for hybrid CPU/GPU inference, especially in low-concurrency scenarios. This hybrid approach leverages both the large, cost-effective memory capacity of CPU/DRAM and the high bandwidth of GPU/VRAM. However, existing hybrid solutions remain bottlenecked by CPU computation limits and CPU-GPU synchronization overheads, severely restricting their ability to efficiently run state-of-the-art large MoE models, such as the 671B DeepSeek-V3/R1.
items.abstract_zh: 由于混合专家（MoE）模型的稀疏性，它们特别适合混合 CPU/GPU 推理，尤其是在低并发场景下。这种混合方法同时利用了 CPU/DRAM 的大容量、经济高效的内存容量和 GPU/VRAM 的高带宽。然而，现有的混合解决方案仍然受到 CPU 计算限制和 CPU-GPU 同步开销的瓶颈，严重限制了它们高效运行最先进的大型 MoE 模型（例如 671B DeepSeek-V3/R1）的能力。

items.title: Proto: A Guided Journey through Modern OS Construction.
items.abstract: Proto is a new instructional OS that runs on commodity, portable hardware. It showcases modern features, including per-app address spaces, threading, commodity filesystems, USB, DMA, multicore support, self-hosted debugging, and a window manager. It supports rich applications such as 2D/3D games, music and video players, and a blockchain miner. Unlike traditional instructional systems, Proto emphasizes engaging, media-rich apps that go beyond basic terminal programs. Our method breaks down a full-featured OS into a set of incremental, self-contained prototypes. Each prototype introduces a minimal set of OS mechanisms, driven by the needs of specific apps. The construction process then progressively enables these apps by bringing up one mechanism at a time.
items.abstract_zh: Proto 是一种新的教学操作系统，可在商用便携式硬件上运行。它展示了现代功能，包括每个应用程序地址空间、线程、商品文件系统、USB、DMA、多核支持、自托管调试和窗口管理器。它支持2D/3D游戏、音乐和视频播放器、区块链矿工等丰富的应用程序。与传统的教学系统不同，Proto 强调引人入胜、媒体丰富的应用程序，超越基本的终端程序。我们的方法将功能齐全的操作系统分解为一组增量的、独立的原型。每个原型都引入了一组最小的操作系统机制，由特定应用程序的需求驱动。然后，构建过程通过一次启动一种机制来逐步启用这些应用程序。

items.title: LithOS: An Operating System for Efficient Machine Learning on GPUs.
items.abstract: The rapid growth of machine learning (ML) has made GPUs indispensable in datacenters and underscores the urgency of improving their efficiency. However, balancing diverse model demands with high utilization remains a fundamental challenge. Transparent, fine-grained GPU resource management that maximizes utilization, energy efficiency, and isolation requires an OS approach. This paper introduces LithOS, a first step towards a GPU OS.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的快速发展使得 GPU 在数据中心中不可或缺，并凸显了提高其效率的紧迫性。然而，平衡不同模型需求和高利用率仍然是一个根本挑战。透明、细粒度的 GPU 资源管理可以最大限度地提高利用率、能源效率和隔离性，需要采用操作系统方法。本文介绍了 LithOS，这是迈向 GPU 操作系统的第一步。

items.title: Mycroft: Tracing Dependencies in Collective Communication Towards Reliable LLM Training.
items.abstract: Reliability is essential for ensuring efficiency in LLM training. However, many real-world reliability issues remain difficult to resolve, resulting in wasted resources and degraded model performance. Unfortunately, today's collective communication libraries operate as black boxes, hiding critical information needed for effective root cause analysis. We propose Mycroft, a lightweight distributed tracing and root cause analysis system designed to address previously hidden reliability issues in collective communication. Mycroft's key idea is to trace collective communication states and leverage internal control and data dependencies to resolve reliability problems in LLM training. Mycroft has been deployed at ByteDance for over six months to debug collective communication related issues at runtime. It detected anomalies within 15 seconds in 90% of cases and identified the root cause within 20 seconds in 60% of cases. We also conducted extensive fault injection experiments to demonstrate Mycroft's capability and efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 可靠性对于确保法学硕士培训的效率至关重要。然而，许多现实世界的可靠性问题仍然难以解决，导致资源浪费和模型性能下降。不幸的是，当今的集体通信库就像黑匣子一样运作，隐藏了有效根本原因分析所需的关键信息。我们提出了 Mycroft，一种轻量级分布式跟踪和根本原因分析系统，旨在解决集体通信中以前隐藏的可靠性问题。 Mycroft 的关键思想是跟踪集体通信状态并利用内部控制和数据依赖性来解决 LLM 培训中的可靠性问题。 Mycroft 已在字节跳动部署了六个多月，用于在运行时调试集体通信相关问题。它在 90% 的情况下在 15 秒内检测到异常，并在 60% 的情况下在 20 秒内确定根本原因。我们还进行了广泛的故障注入实验来证明 Mycroft 的能力和效率。

items.title: Tai Chi: A General High-Efficiency Scheduling Framework for SmartNICs in Hyperscale Clouds.
items.abstract: Cloud service providers increasingly adopt SmartNICs to offload data-plane services (e.g., DPDK and SPDK) and control-plane tasks (such as disk and NIC initialization). Our analysis of production environments reveals that data-plane services statically provision CPUs for peak load, resulting in 67.5% idle CPU cycles during 99% of their runtime in IaaS clouds, leading to wasted CPU resources. On the other hand, control-plane tasks fail to meet critical Service Level Objectives (SLOs), such as virtual machine startup time. Unfortunately, achieving control-plane SLO improvements through co-scheduling with idle data-plane services remains highly challenging, due to the combined effects of intrinsic scheduling latency and the substantial architectural complexity inherent to control-plane ecosystems.
items.abstract_zh: 云服务提供商越来越多地采用 SmartNIC 来卸载数据平面服务（例如 DPDK 和 SPDK）和控制平面任务（例如磁盘和 NIC 初始化）。我们对生产环境的分析表明，数据平面服务为峰值负载静态配置 CPU，导致 IaaS 云中 99% 的运行时间中有 67.5% 的 CPU 周期空闲，从而导致 CPU 资源浪费。另一方面，控制平面任务无法满足关键的服务级别目标 (SLO)，例如虚拟机启动时间。不幸的是，由于内在调度延迟和控制平面生态系统固有的架构复杂性的综合影响，通过与空闲数据平面服务共同调度来实现控制平面 SLO 改进仍然非常具有挑战性。

items.title: PrefillOnly: An Inference Engine for Prefill-only Workloads in Large Language Model Applications.
items.abstract: Besides typical generative applications, like ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor, we observe an emerging trend that LLMs are increasingly used in traditional discriminative tasks, such as recommendation, credit verification, and data labeling. The key characteristic of these emerging use cases is that the LLM generates only a single output token, rather than an arbitrarily long sequence of tokens. We refer to this as a prefill-only workload. However, since existing LLM engines assume arbitrary output lengths, they fail to leverage the unique properties of prefill-only workloads. In this paper, we present PrefillOnly, the first LLM inference engine that improves the inference throughput and latency by fully embracing the properties of prefill-only workloads. First, since it generates only one token, PrefillOnly only needs to store the KV cache of only the last computed layer, rather than of all layers. This drastically reduces the GPU memory footprint of LLM inference and allows handling long inputs without using solutions that reduce throughput, such as cross-GPU KV cache parallelization. Second, because the output length is fixed, rather than arbitrary, PrefillOnly can precisely determine the job completion time (JCT) of each prefill-only request before it starts. This enables efficient JCT-aware scheduling policies such as shortest prefill first. PrefillOnly can process up to 4× larger queries per second without inflating the average and P99 latency.
items.abstract_zh: 除了 ChatGPT、GitHub Copilot 和 Cursor 等典型的生成应用程序之外，我们还观察到一个新兴趋势，即 LLM 越来越多地用于传统的判别性任务，例如推荐、信用验证和数据标记。这些新兴用例的关键特征是 LLM 仅生成单个输出令牌，而不是任意长的令牌序列。我们将此称为仅预填充工作负载。然而，由于现有的 LLM 引擎假定任意输出长度，因此它们无法利用仅预填充工作负载的独特属性。在本文中，我们提出了 PrefillOnly，这是第一个 LLM 推理引擎，它通过完全采用仅预填充工作负载的属性来提高推理吞吐量和延迟。首先，由于它只生成一个令牌，PrefillOnly 只需要存储最后计算层的 KV 缓存，而不是所有层的 KV 缓存。这大大减少了 LLM 推理的 GPU 内存占用，并允许处理长输入，而无需使用降低吞吐量的解决方案，例如跨 GPU KV 缓存并行化。其次，由于输出长度是固定的，而不是任意的，PrefillOnly 可以在每个仅预填充请求开始之前精确确定其作业完成时间（JCT）。这可以实现高效的 JCT 感知调度策略，例如最短预填充优先。 PrefillOnly 每秒最多可以处理 4 倍大的查询，而不会增加平均延迟和 P99 延迟。

items.title: Tiga: Accelerating Geo-Distributed Transactions with Synchronized Clocks.
items.abstract: This paper presents Tiga, a new design for geo-replicated and scalable transactional databases such as Google Spanner. Tiga aims to commit transactions within 1 wide-area roundtrip time, or 1 WRTT, for a wide range of scenarios, while maintaining high throughput with minimal computational overhead. Tiga consolidates concurrency control and consensus, completing both strictly serializable execution and consistent replication in a single round. It uses synchronized clocks to proactively order transactions by assigning each a future timestamp at submission. In most cases, transactions arrive at servers before their future timestamps and are serialized according to the designated timestamp, requiring 1 WRTT to commit. In rare cases, transactions are delayed and proactive ordering fails, in which case Tiga falls back to a slow path, committing in 1.5–2 WRTTs. Compared to state-of-the-art solutions, Tiga can commit more transactions at 1-WRTT latency, and incurs much less throughput overhead. Evaluation results show that Tiga outperforms all baselines, achieving 1.3–7.2× higher throughput and 1.4–4.6× lower latency. Tiga is open-sourced at https://github.com/New-Consensus-Concurrency-Control/Tiga.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Tiga，这是一种针对地理复制和可扩展事务数据库（例如 Google Spanner）的新设计。 Tiga 的目标是在 1 个广域往返时间或 1 个 WRTT 内提交事务，适用于各种场景，同时以最小的计算开销保持高吞吐量。 Tiga 整合了并发控制和共识，在单轮中完成了严格的可序列化执行和一致复制。它使用同步时钟通过在提交时为每个事务分配一个未来时间戳来主动排序事务。在大多数情况下，事务在未来时间戳之前到达服务器，并根据指定时间戳进行序列化，需要 1 WRTT 才能提交。在极少数情况下，交易会延迟并且主动排序失败，在这种情况下，Tiga 会退回到慢速路径，在 1.5-2 WRTT 内提交。与最先进的解决方案相比，Tiga 可以以 1-WRTT 延迟提交更多事务，并且产生的吞吐量开销要少得多。评估结果表明，Tiga 的性能优于所有基线，吞吐量提高了 1.3–7.2 倍，延迟降低了 1.4–4.6 倍。 Tiga 在 https://github.com/New-Consensus-Concurrency-Control/Tiga 上开源。

items.title: Pie: A Programmable Serving System for Emerging LLM Applications.
items.abstract: Emerging large language model (LLM) applications involve diverse reasoning strategies and agentic workflows, straining the capabilities of existing serving systems built on a monolithic token generation loop. This paper introduces Pie, a programmable LLM serving system designed for flexibility and efficiency. Pie decomposes the traditional generation loop into fine-grained service handlers exposed via an API and delegates control of the generation process to user-provided programs, called inferlets. This enables applications to implement new KV cache strategies, bespoke generation logic, and seamlessly integrate computation and I/O—entirely within the application, without requiring modifications to the serving system. Pie executes inferlets using WebAssembly, benefiting from its lightweight sandboxing. Our evaluation shows Pie matches state-of-the-art performance on standard tasks (3-12% latency overhead) while significantly improving latency and throughput (1.3×-3.4× higher) on agentic workflows by enabling application-specific optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的大型语言模型（LLM）应用程序涉及不同的推理策略和代理工作流程，这对构建在整体令牌生成循环上的现有服务系统的能力造成了压力。本文介绍了 Pie，一个专为灵活性和效率而设计的可编程法学硕士服务系统。 Pie 将传统的生成循环分解为通过 API 公开的细粒度服务处理程序，并将生成过程的控制权委托给用户提供的程序（称为 inferlet）。这使得应用程序能够实现新的 KV 缓存策略、定制生成逻辑，并完全在应用程序内无缝集成计算和 I/O，而无需修改服务系统。 Pie 使用 WebAssembly 执行 inferlet，受益于其轻量级沙箱。我们的评估表明，Pie 在标准任务上达到了最先进的性能（3-12% 延迟开销），同时通过启用特定于应用程序的优化，显着改善了代理工作流程的延迟和吞吐量（1.3×-3.4×更高）。

items.title: Mercury: Unlocking Multi-GPU Operator Optimization for LLMs via Remote Memory Scheduling.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose Mercury, a multi-GPU operator compiler based on a loop-based intermediate representation, CommIR. At the core of Mercury is an abstraction that treats remote GPU memory as an explicitly managed extension of the memory hierarchy, expanding the available storage and communication resources beyond local HBM. This unified view enables the compiler to reason holistically about data placement and inter-device communication, unlocking a vastly larger design space that encompasses and extends beyond existing manual strategies. As a result, Mercury is able to automatically reproduce the performance of hand-optimized baselines like RingAttention and Ulysses, and in some configurations, even discovers more effective strategies that manual designs have overlooked. Our implementation is open-sourced at https://github.com/ChandlerGuan/mercury_artifact.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Mercury，一种基于循环中间表示 CommIR 的多 GPU 运算符编译器。 Mercury 的核心是一种抽象，它将远程 GPU 内存视为内存层次结构的显式管理扩展，将可用存储和通信资源扩展到本地 HBM 之外。这种统一的视图使编译器能够对数据放置和设备间通信进行整体推理，从而释放出更大的设计空间，涵盖并扩展了现有的手动策略。因此，Mercury 能够自动重现像 RingAttention 和 Ulysses 这样的手动优化基线的性能，并且在某些配置中，甚至发现了手动设计忽略的更有效的策略。我们的实现是开源的，位于 https://github.com/ChandlerGuan/mercury_artifact。

items.title: How to Copy Memory? Coordinated Asynchronous Copy as a First-Class OS Service.
items.abstract: In modern systems, memory copy remains a critical performance bottleneck across various scenarios, playing a pervasive role in system-wide execution such as syscalls, IPC, and user-mode applications. Numerous efforts have aimed at optimizing copy performance, including zero-copy with page remapping and hardware-accelerated copy. However, they typically target specific use cases, such as Linux zero-copy send() for messages of ≥10KB. This paper argues for copy as a first-class OS service, offering three key benefits: (1) with the asynchronous copy abstraction provided by the service, applications can overlap their execution with copy; (2) the service can effectively utilize hardware capabilities to enhance copy performance; (3) the service's global view of copies further enables holistic optimization. To this end, we introduce Copier, a new OS service of coordinated asynchronous copy, to serve both user-mode applications and OS services. We build Copier-Linux to demonstrate Copier's ability to improve performance for diverse use cases, including Redis, Protobuf, network stack, proxy, etc. Evaluations show that Copier achieves up to a 1.8 × speedup for real-world applications like Redis and a 1.6 × improvement over zIO, the state-of-the-art in optimizing copy efficiency. To further facilitate adoption, we develop a toolchain to ease the use of Copier. We also integrate Copier into a commercial smartphone OS (HarmonyOS 5.0), achieving promising results.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代系统中，内存复制仍然是各种场景中的关键性能瓶颈，在系统调用、IPC 和用户模式应用程序等系统范围执行中发挥着普遍作用。许多努力旨在优化复制性能，包括带有页面重新映射的零复制和硬件加速复制。然而，它们通常针对特定的用例，例如用于 ≥10KB 消息的 Linux 零拷贝 send()。本文主张复制作为一流的操作系统服务，具有三个关键优势：（1）通过服务提供的异步复制抽象，应用程序可以将其执行与复制重叠； (2) 该服务能够有效利用硬件能力来增强复制性能； (3)服务的全局副本视图进一步实现了整体优化。为此，我们引入了Copier，一种新的协调异步复制的操作系统服务，为用户模式应用程序和操作系统服务提供服务。我们构建 Copier-Linux 是为了展示 Copier 提高各种用例性能的能力，包括 Redis、Protobuf、网络堆栈、代理等。评估表明，Copier 对 Redis 等实际应用程序实现了高达 1.8 倍的加速，比 zIO 提高了 1.6 倍，zIO 是优化复制效率的最先进技术。为了进一步促进采用，我们开发了一个工具链来简化 Copier 的使用。我们还将Copier集成到商业智能手机操作系统（HarmonyOS 5.0）中，取得了可喜的成果。

items.title: Demeter: A Scalable and Elastic Tiered Memory Solution for Virtualized Cloud via Guest Delegation.
items.abstract: Memory scalability has emerged as a critical bottleneck in virtualized cloud environments. Tiered memory architectures that combine limited fast memory with abundant slower memory offer a promising solution, but existing hypervisor-based approaches suffer from significant performance penalties. We present Demeter, introducing a paradigm shift through guest-delegated tiered memory management based on two key insights: (1) delegation to guests eliminates both expensive access tracking at the hypervisor level and frequent TLB flushes that severely degrade memory virtualization performance under two-dimensional address translation, and (2) Processor Event-Based Sampling, which cannot be effectively utilized by hypervisor-based solutions, remains fully functional and highly efficient when properly leveraged within the guest. Building on these insights, Demeter designs an efficient range-based tiered memory management scheme in guest virtual address space to preserve locality information and employs a double balloon-based provisioning mechanism that maintains cloud elasticity while enabling vendor-specific QoS control. Our evaluation with seven real-world workloads across DRAM+PMEM and DRAM+CXL.mem configurations demonstrates that Demeter improves performance by up to 2× compared to existing hypervisor-based approaches and by 28% on average compared to the next best guest-based alternative. Our implementation is fully open source and publicly available at Zenodo.
items.abstract_zh: 内存可扩展性已成为虚拟化云环境中的关键瓶颈。将有限的快速内存与丰富的慢速内存相结合的分层内存架构提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但现有的基于管理程序的方法遭受了严重的性能损失。我们提出 Demeter，通过基于两个关键见解的来宾委托分层内存管理引入了范式转变：(1) 对来宾的委派消除了虚拟机管理程序级别上昂贵的访问跟踪和频繁的 TLB 刷新，这会严重降低二维地址转换下的内存虚拟化性能；(2) 基于处理器事件的采样无法被基于虚拟机管理程序的解决方案有效利用，但在来宾中正确利用时，仍能保持完整的功能和高效。基于这些见解，Demeter 在来宾虚拟地址空间中设计了一种高效的基于范围的分层内存管理方案，以保留位置信息，并采用基于双气球的配置机制，在保持云弹性的同时实现特定于供应商的 QoS 控制。我们对 DRAM+PMEM 和 DRAM+CXL.mem 配置中的七个实际工作负载进行的评估表明，与现有的基于虚拟机管理程序的方法相比，Demeter 的性能提高了高达 2 倍，与下一个最佳的基于客户的替代方案相比，性能平均提高了 28%。我们的实现是完全开源的，并可在 Zenodo 上公开获取。

items.title: HedraRAG: Co-Optimizing Generation and Retrieval for Heterogeneous RAG Workflows.
Mitigating Application Resource Overload with Targeted Task Cancellation.
items.abstract: Modern software inevitably encounters periods of resource overload, during which it must still sustain high servicelevel objective (SLO) attainment while minimizing request loss. However, achieving this balance is challenging due to subtle and unpredictable internal resource contention among concurrently executing requests. Traditional overload control mechanisms, which rely on global signals, such as queuing delays, fail to handle application resource overload effectively because they cannot accurately predict which requests will monopolize critical resources.
items.abstract_zh: 现代软件不可避免地会遇到资源过载的情况，在此期间，它仍然必须维持高服务级别目标 (SLO) 的实现，同时最大限度地减少请求损失。然而，由于并发执行的请求之间存在微妙且不可预测的内部资源争用，因此实现这种平衡具有挑战性。传统的过载控制机制依赖于全局信号（例如排队延迟），无法有效地处理应用程序资源过载，因为它们无法准确预测哪些请求将独占关键资源。

items.title: WASIT: Deep and Continuous Differential Testing of WebAssembly System Interface Implementations.
items.abstract: This paper presents WASIT, a powerful specification-driven differential testing framework for WebAssembly (Wasm) system interface (WASI) implementations. WASIT invents several innovative techniques to address the challenges facing state-of-the-art testing approaches when applied to WASI implementations. Specifically, it introduces real-time resource abstraction and tracking to facilitate the generation of meaningful and dependent WASI function calls. It also creates a domain-specific language to automatically filter out uninteresting WASI function argument values by augmenting the WASI specification. Finally, it adopts a decoupled system architecture to achieve smooth co-evolution with WASI. Our evaluation shows that WASIT successfully found 48 new WASI-specific bugs in six popular Wasm runtimes, with 41 confirmed, 37 fixed, and three CVEs assigned.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 WASIT，这是一个强大的规范驱动的差异测试框架，用于 WebAssembly (Wasm) 系统接口 (WASI) 实现。 WASIT 发明了多种创新技术来解决最先进的测试方法在应用于 WASI 实施时所面临的挑战。具体来说，它引入了实时资源抽象和跟踪，以方便生成有意义且相关的 WASI 函数调用。它还创建了一种特定于领域的语言，通过增强 WASI 规范来自动过滤掉不感兴趣的 WASI 函数参数值。最后，采用解耦的系统架构，实现与WASI的平滑协同进化。我们的评估显示，WASIT 在 6 个流行的 Wasm 运行时中成功发现了 48 个新的 WASI 特定错误，其中 41 个已确认，37 个已修复，并分配了 3 个 CVE。

items.title: Analyzing and Enhancing ArckFS: An Anecdotal Example of Benefits of Artifact Evaluation.
items.abstract: We analyze and enhance Trio and ArckFS by Zhou et al. (SOSP 2023), high-performance NVM file system architecture and file system. A group of authors from KAIST initiated this study through a careful review of the paper and the released artifact, seeking to enhance the Trio work. Their analysis identifies (1) insufficient clarity in the paper on the handling of multi-inode operations, and (2) several implementation bugs in ArckFS that cause occasional operation failures or potential crash inconsistencies during inode creation.
items.abstract_zh: 我们分析并增强了 Zhou 等人的 Trio 和 AckFS。 (SOSP 2023)，高性能NVM文件系统架构和文件系统。 KAIST 的一组作者通过仔细审查论文和已发布的工件发起了这项研究，旨在增强 Trio 的工作。他们的分析发现：(1) 论文中关于处理多 inode 操作的清晰度不够，以及 (2) ArckFS 中的几个实现错误导致 inode 创建过程中偶尔出现操作失败或潜在的崩溃不一致。

items.title: Optimistic Recovery for High-Availability Software via Partial Process State Preservation.
items.abstract: Achieving high availability for modern software requires fast and correct recovery from inevitable faults. This is notoriously difficult. Existing techniques either guarantee correctness by discarding all state but suffer from long downtime, or preserve all state to recover quickly but reintroduce the fault.
items.abstract_zh: 实现现代软件的高可用性需要从不可避免的故障中快速、正确地恢复。这是众所周知的困难。现有技术要么通过丢弃所有状态来保证正确性，但会遭受较长的停机时间，要么保留所有状态以快速恢复，但会重新引入故障。

items.title: Running Consistent Applications Closer to Users with Radical for Lower Latency.
items.abstract: Running applications close to users—in nearby datacenters, at edge points of presence, or in on-premises clusters—is attractive, as it reduces end-to-end latency. Moving strong consistent applications closer to users is difficult, as they incur high latencies either when accessing, or coordinating, their storage system. This restricts such applications to running co-located with their data, in a datacenter. Radical allows these applications to leverage the latency benefits that come from running near users. Radical uses its new LVI protocol to perform all necessary coordination in a single request. This request guarantees linearizability with a combination of locks, a validation step, and write intents. Radical hides the latency of the LVI request by overlapping it with speculative execution of the application. Our evaluation shows that Radical achieves 84–89% of the latency improvement obtainable by moving out of the datacenter, while providing Linearizability.
items.abstract_zh: 在靠近用户的位置（在附近的数据中心、边缘点或本地集群中）运行应用程序很有吸引力，因为它可以减少端到端延迟。将强一致的应用程序移至更靠近用户的位置是很困难的，因为它们在访问或协调其存储系统时会产生高延迟。这限制了此类应用程序与其数据一起在数据中心运行。 Radical 允许这些应用程序利用在用户附近运行所带来的延迟优势。 Radical 使用其新的 LVI 协议在单个请求中执行所有必要的协调。此请求通过锁、验证步骤和写入意图的组合来保证线性化。 Radical 通过将 LVI 请求与应用程序的推测执行重叠来隐藏 LVI 请求的延迟。我们的评估表明，Radical 实现了通过移出数据中心可获得的 84-89% 的延迟改善，同时提供了线性化能力。

items.title: Scalable Address Spaces using Concurrent Interval Skiplist.
items.abstract: This is the Scalable Address Spaces using Concurrent Interval Skiplist paper artifact for the 31st Symposium on Operating Systems Principles (SOSP '25). Please refer to the README.md file in interval-vm-artifact-sosp2025.zip for details.
items.abstract_zh: 这是第 31 届操作系统原理研讨会 (SOSP '25) 的使用并发间隔跳表的可扩展地址空间论文工件。详细信息请参考interval-vm-artifact-sosp2025.zip中的README.md文件。

items.title: μFork: Supporting POSIX fork Within a Single-Address-Space OS.
items.abstract: Single-address-space operating systems have well-known lightweightness benefits that result from their central design idea: the kernel and applications share a unique address space. This model makes these operating systems (OSes) incompatible by design with a large class of software: multiprocess POSIX applications. Indeed, the semantics of the primitive used to create POSIX processes, fork, are inextricably tied to the existence of multiple address spaces.
items.abstract_zh: 单地址空间操作系统具有众所周知的轻量级优势，这源于其核心设计思想：内核和应用程序共享唯一的地址空间。此模型使这些操作系统 (OS) 在设计上与一大类软件不兼容：多进程 POSIX 应用程序。事实上，用于创建 POSIX 进程的原语（fork）的语义与多个地址空间的存在密不可分。

items.title: Unlocking True Elasticity for the Cloud-Native Era with Dandelion.
items.abstract: Elasticity is fundamental to cloud computing. An elastic platform can quickly allocate resources to match the demand of each workload as it arrives, rather than pre-provisioning resources to meet performance objectives. However, even serverless platforms — which boot sandboxes in 10s to 100s of milliseconds — are not sufficiently elastic to avoid pre-provisioning expensive resources. Today's FaaS platforms provision many extra, idle sandboxes in memory to reduce the occurrence of slow, cold starts. Initializing securely isolated sandboxes with a POSIX-like computing environment that today's cloud users expect is slow as it requires booting a guest OS and configuring networking.
items.abstract_zh: 弹性是云计算的基础。弹性平台可以快速分配资源，以满足每个工作负载到达时的需求，而不是预先配置资源来满足性能目标。然而，即使是在数十到数百毫秒内启动沙箱的无服务器平台也没有足够的弹性来避免预先配置昂贵的资源。如今的 FaaS 平台在内存中提供了许多额外的空闲沙箱，以减少缓慢、冷启动的发生。使用当今云用户期望的类似 POSIX 的计算环境初始化安全隔离的沙箱速度很慢，因为它需要启动来宾操作系统并配置网络。

items.title: FlexGuard: Fast Mutual Exclusion Independent of Subscription.
items.abstract: Performance-oriented applications require efficient locks to harness the computing power of multicore architectures. While fast, spinlock algorithms suffer severe performance degradation when thread counts exceed available hardware capacity, i.e., in oversubscribed scenarios. Existing solutions rely on imprecise heuristics for blocking, leading to suboptimal performance. We present FlexGuard, the first approach that systematically switches from busy-waiting to blocking precisely when a lock-holding thread is preempted. Flex-Guard achieves this by communicating with the OS scheduler via eBPF, unlike prior approaches. FlexGuard matches or improves performance in LevelDB, a memory-optimized database index, PARSEC's Dedup, and SPLASH2X's Raytrace and Streamcluster, boosting throughput by 1–6× in non-oversubscribed and up to 5× in oversubscribed scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 面向性能的应用程序需要高效的锁来利用多核架构的计算能力。虽然速度很快，但当线程数超过可用硬件容量时（即在超额订阅的情况下），自旋锁算法的性能会严重下降。现有的解决方案依赖于不精确的启发式阻塞，导致性能不佳。我们提出了 FlexGuard，这是第一种在持有锁的线程被抢占时系统地从忙等待切换到阻塞的方法。与之前的方法不同，Flex-Guard 通过 eBPF 与操作系统调度程序通信来实现这一点。 FlexGuard 与 LevelDB、内存优化数据库索引、PARSEC 的 Dedup 以及 SPLASH2X 的 Raytrace 和 Streamcluster 的性能相匹配或提高，在非超额订阅情况下将吞吐量提高 1-6 倍，在超额订阅情况下最高可提高 5 倍。

items.title: Spirit: Fair Allocation of Interdependent Resources in Remote Memory Systems.
items.abstract: We address the problem of fair resource allocation in multiuser remote memory systems. Allocating local memory (used as cache) and network bandwidth to remote memory in such systems is challenging due to the complex interdependence between the two resources and application performance. A larger cache may reduce the need for fetching data over the network, while a larger bandwidth may permit more concurrent network requests, avoiding the need for large caches. As a result, applications can achieve the same data access throughput for a wide range of cache and bandwidth allocations. Such interdependence is unique to each application and hard to capture offline.
items.abstract_zh: 我们解决多用户远程存储系统中公平资源分配的问题。由于两种资源和应用程序性能之间复杂的相互依赖关系，在此类系统中将本地内存（用作缓存）和网络带宽分配给远程内存具有挑战性。较大的缓存可以减少通过网络获取数据的需要，而较大的带宽可以允许更多并发网络请求，从而避免对大型缓存的需要。因此，应用程序可以在各种缓存和带宽分配下实现相同的数据访问吞吐量。这种相互依赖性对于每个应用程序来说都是独特的，并且很难离线捕获。

items.title: Mantle: Efficient Hierarchical Metadata Management for Cloud Object Storage Services.
Orthrus: Efficient and Timely Detection of Silent User Data Corruption in the Cloud with Resource-Adaptive Computation Validation.
items.abstract: Even with substantial endeavors to test and validate processors, computational errors may still arise post-installation. One particular category of CPU errors transpires discreetly, without crashing applications or triggering hardware warnings. These elusive errors pose a significant threat by undermining user data, and their detection is challenging. This paper introduces Orthrus, a solution for the timely detection of silent user data corruption caused by post-installation CPU errors. Orthrus safeguards user data in cloud applications by providing simple annotations and compiler support for users to identify data operators and validating these operators asynchronously across cores while maintaining a low overhead (2%–6%), making it practical for production deployment. Our evaluation, using carefully injected errors, demonstrates that Orthrus can detect 87% of data corruptions with just a single core dedicated to validation, increasing to 91% and 96% when two and four cores are used, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 即使付出了大量努力来测试和验证处理器，安装后仍然可能出现计算错误。一类特定的 CPU 错误会悄悄发生，不会导致应用程序崩溃或触发硬件警告。这些难以捉摸的错误会破坏用户数据，从而构成重大威胁，并且它们的检测具有挑战性。本文介绍了 Orthrus，这是一种及时检测由安装后 CPU 错误导致的无提示用户数据损坏的解决方案。 Orthrus 通过为用户提供简单的注释和编译器支持来识别数据运算符并跨内核异步验证这些运算符，同时保持较低的开销 (2%–6%)，从而保护云应用程序中的用户数据，使其适用于生产部署。我们使用仔细注入的错误进行的评估表明，Orthrus 只需一个专用于验证的核心即可检测到 87% 的数据损坏，当使用两个和四个核心时，分别增加到 91% 和 96%。

items.title: TrainVerify: Equivalence-Based Verification for Distributed LLM Training.
items.abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) at scale requires parallel execution across thousands of devices, incurring enormous computational costs. Yet, these costly distributed trainings are prone to correctness bugs, causing silent errors and potentially wasting millions of GPU hours. These bugs are challenging to expose through testing.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 需要在数千台设备上并行执行，从而产生巨大的计算成本。然而，这些成本高昂的分布式训练很容易出现正确性错误，导致无声错误并可能浪费数百万个 GPU 小时。这些错误很难通过测试暴露出来。

items.title: Ghost in the Android Shell: Pragmatic Test-oracle Specification of a Production Hypervisor.
items.abstract: Developing systems code that robustly provides its intended security guarantees remains very challenging: conventional practice does not suffice, and full functional verification, while now feasible in some contexts, has substantial barriers to entry and use.
items.abstract_zh: 开发能够可靠地提供其预期安全保证的系统代码仍然非常具有挑战性：传统实践是不够的，而完整的功能验证虽然现在在某些情况下是可行的，但在进入和使用方面存在很大的障碍。

items.title: TRIP: Coercion-resistant Registration for E-Voting with Verifiability and Usability in Votegral.
items.abstract: Online voting is convenient and flexible, but amplifies the risks of voter coercion and vote buying. One promising mitigation strategy enables voters to give a coercer fake voting credentials, which silently cast votes that do not count. Current systems along these lines make problematic assumptions about credential issuance, however, such as strong trust in a registrar and/or in voter-controlled hardware, or expecting voters to interact with multiple registrars. Votegral is the first coercion-resistant voting architecture that leverages the physical security of in-person registration to address these credential-issuance challenges, amortizing the convenience costs of in-person registration by reusing credentials across successive elections. Votegral's registration component, TRIP, gives voters a kiosk in a privacy booth with which to print real and fake credentials on paper, eliminating dependence on trusted hardware in credential issuance. The voter learns and can verify in the privacy booth which credential is real, but real and fake credentials thereafter appear indistinguishable to others. Only voters actually under coercion, a hopefully-rare case, need to trust the kiosk. To achieve verifiability, each paper credential encodes an interactive zero-knowledge proof, which is sound in real credentials but unsound in fake credentials. Voters observe the difference in the order of printing steps, but need not understand the technical details. Experimental results with our prototype suggest that Votegral is practical and sufficiently scalable for real-world elections. User-visible latency of credential issuance in TRIP is at most 19.7 seconds even on resource-constrained kiosk hardware, making it suitable for registration at remote locations or on battery power. A companion usability study indicates that TRIP's usability is competitive with other e-voting systems including some lacking coercion resistance, and formal proofs support TRIP's combination of coercion-resistance and verifiability.
items.abstract_zh: 网络投票方便灵活，但也放大了选民胁迫和买票的风险。一种有希望的缓解策略使选民能够向胁迫者提供虚假的投票凭证，从而默默地投出不计数的选票。然而，当前的系统对证书颁发做出了有问题的假设，例如对注册商和/或选民控制的硬件的强烈信任，或者期望选民与多个注册商进行交互。 Votegral 是第一个抗强制投票架构，它利用亲自注册的物理安全性来解决这些凭证颁发挑战，通过在连续选举中重复使用凭证来分摊亲自注册的便利成本。 Votegral 的注册组件 TRIP 在隐私亭为选民提供了一个信息亭，可以在纸上打印真实和虚假的凭证，从而消除了凭证颁发中对可信硬件的依赖。选民可以在隐私亭中了解并验证哪些凭证是真实的，但此后其他人就无法区分真假凭证。只有真正受到胁迫的选民（希望这种情况很少见）才需要信任这个信息亭。为了实现可验证性，每个纸质凭证都编码了一个交互式零知识证明，该证明在真实凭证中是可靠的，但在虚假凭证中是不可靠的。投票者观察打印步骤顺序的差异，但无需了解技术细节。我们原型的实验结果表明，Votegral 对于现实世界的选举来说是实用的并且具有足够的可扩展性。即使在资源有限的自助服务终端硬件上，TRIP 中用户可见的凭证颁发延迟也最多为 19.7 秒，这使其适合在远程位置或使用电池进行注册。一项配套的可用性研究表明，TRIP 的可用性与其他电子投票系统（包括一些缺乏抗强制性的系统）相比具有竞争力，并且正式证据支持 TRIP 的抗强制性和可验证性的结合。

items.title: Scalable Far Memory: Balancing Faults and Evictions.
items.abstract: Page-based far memory systems transparently expand an application's memory capacity beyond a single machine without modifying application code. However, existing systems are tailored to scenarios with low application thread counts, and fail to scale on today's multi-core machines. This makes them unsuitable for data-intensive applications that both rely on far memory support and scale with increasing thread count. Our analysis reveals that this poor scalability stems from inefficient holistic coordination between page fault-in and eviction operations. As thread count increases, current systems encounter scalability bottlenecks in TLB shootdowns, page accounting, and memory allocation.
items.abstract_zh: 基于页面的远内存系统可以透明地将应用程序的内存容量扩展到单台机器之外，而无需修改应用程序代码。然而，现有系统是针对应用程序线程数较低的场景量身定制的，无法在当今的多核机器上进行扩展。这使得它们不适合数据密集型应用程序，这些应用程序既依赖远内存支持，又随着线程数量的增加而扩展。我们的分析表明，这种糟糕的可扩展性源于页面错误和逐出操作之间低效的整体协调。随着线程数量的增加，当前系统在 TLB 关闭、页面统计和内存分配方面遇到了可扩展性瓶颈。

items.title: Device-Assisted Live Migration of RDMA Devices.
items.abstract: Recently, we have seen growing pressure to move highperformance workloads, such as HPC and AI, to cloud environments that offer more affordable and manageable infrastructure. These workloads require direct access to RDMA devices for high-performance communication. Device passthrough, however, violates the decoupling between the guest OS and the underlying hardware, making Live Migration (LM) extremely challenging [29, 38, 40, 42, 48].
items.abstract_zh: 最近，我们看到将高性能工作负载（例如 HPC 和 AI）迁移到提供更实惠且易于管理的基础设施的云环境的压力越来越大。这些工作负载需要直接访问 RDMA 设备以实现高性能通信。然而，设备直通违反了来宾操作系统和底层硬件之间的解耦，使得实时迁移（LM）极具挑战性[29,38,40,42,48]。

items.title: Moirai: Optimizing Placement of Data and Compute in Hybrid Clouds.
items.abstract: The deployment of large-scale data analytics between on-premise and cloud sites, i.e., hybrid clouds, requires careful partitioning of both data and computation to avoid massive networking costs. We present Moirai, a cost-optimization framework that analyzes job accesses and data dependencies and optimizes the placement of both in hybrid clouds. Moirai informs the job scheduler of data location and access predictions, so it can determine where jobs should be executed to minimize data transfer costs. Our optimizer achieves scalability and cost efficiency by exploiting recurring jobs to identify data dependencies and job access characteristics and reduces the search space by excluding data not accessed recently.
items.abstract_zh: 在本地和云站点（即混合云）之间部署大规模数据分析需要仔细划分数据和计算，以避免大量的网络成本。我们推出了 Moirai，这是一个成本优化框架，可分析作业访问和数据依赖性并优化两者在混合云中的放置。 Moirai 向作业调度程序通知数据位置和访问预测，以便它可以确定应在何处执行作业以最大限度地降低数据传输成本。我们的优化器通过利用重复作业来识别数据依赖性和作业访问特征来实现可扩展性和成本效率，并通过排除最近未访问的数据来减少搜索空间。

items.title: Coyote v2: Raising the Level of Abstraction for Data Center FPGAs.
items.abstract: In the trend towards hardware specialization, FPGAs play a dual role as accelerators for offloading, e.g., network virtualization, and as a vehicle for prototyping and exploring hardware designs. While FPGAs offer versatility and performance, integrating them in larger systems remains challenging. Thus, recent efforts have focused on raising the level of abstraction through better interfaces and high-level programming languages. Yet, there is still quite some room for improvement. In this paper, we present Coyote v2, an open-source FPGA shell built with a novel, three-layer hierarchical design supporting dynamic partial reconfiguration of services and user logic, with a unified logic interface, and high-level software abstractions which facilitate application deployment, multi-tenancy and transparent workload pipelining. Experimental results indicate Coyote v2 reduces synthesis times between 15% and 20% and run-time reconfiguration times by an order of magnitude, when compared to existing systems. We also demonstrate the advantages of Coyote v2 by deploying several realistic applications, including HyperLogLog cardinality estimation, AES encryption, and neural network inference. Finally, Coyote v2 places a great deal of emphasis on integration with real systems through reusable and reconfigurable services, including a fully RoCE v2-compliant networking stack, a shared virtual memory model with the host, and a DMA engine between FPGAs and GPUs. We demonstrate these features by, e.g., seamlessly deploying an FPGA-accelerated neural network from Python.
items.abstract_zh: 在硬件专业化的趋势中，FPGA 发挥着双重作用：作为卸载（例如网络虚拟化）的加速器，以及作为原型设计和探索硬件设计的工具。虽然 FPGA 提供了多功能性和性能，但将它们集成到更大的系统中仍然具有挑战性。因此，最近的努力集中在通过更好的接口和高级编程语言来提高抽象级别。然而，仍有相当大的改进空间。在本文中，我们介绍了 Coyote v2，这是一种开源 FPGA shell，采用新颖的三层分层设计构建，支持服务和用户逻辑的动态部分重新配置，具有统一的逻辑接口和高级软件抽象，有助于应用程序部署、多租户和透明的工作负载流水线。实验结果表明，与现有系统相比，Coyote v2 将综合时间减少了 15% 至 20%，并将运行时重新配置时间减少了一个数量级。我们还通过部署几个实际应用程序来展示 Coyote v2 的优势，包括 HyperLogLog 基数估计、AES 加密和神经网络推理。最后，Coyote v2 非常重视通过可重用和可重新配置的服务与真实系统集成，包括完全符合 RoCE v2 的网络堆栈、与主机共享的虚拟内存模型以及 FPGA 和 GPU 之间的 DMA 引擎。我们通过从 Python 无缝部署 FPGA 加速神经网络等方式来演示这些功能。

items.title: METIS: Fast Quality-Aware RAG Systems with Configuration Adaptation.
items.abstract: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) allows LLMs (large language models) to generate better responses with external knowledge, but using more external knowledge causes higher response delay. Prior work focuses either on reducing the response delay (e.g., better scheduling of RAG queries) or on maximizing quality (e.g., tuning the RAG workflow), but they fall short in systematically balancing the tradeoff between the delay and quality of RAG responses. To balance both quality and response delay, this paper presents METIS, the first RAG system that jointly schedules queries and adapts the key RAG configurations of each query, such as the number of retrieved text chunks and synthesis methods. Using four popular RAG-QA datasets, we show that compared to the state-of-the-art RAG optimization schemes, METIS reduces the generation latency by 1.64 – 2.54× without sacrificing generation quality.
items.abstract_zh: RAG（检索增强生成）允许LLM（大型语言模型）利用外部知识生成更好的响应，但使用更多的外部知识会导致更高的响应延迟。先前的工作重点是减少响应延迟（例如，更好地调度 RAG 查询）或最大化质量（例如，调整 RAG 工作流程），但它们在系统地平衡 RAG 响应延迟和质量之间的权衡方面存在不足。为了平衡质量和响应延迟，本文提出了 METIS，这是第一个联合调度查询并调整每个查询的关键 RAG 配置（例如检索的文本块的数量和合成方法）的 RAG 系统。使用四个流行的 RAG-QA 数据集，我们表明，与最先进的 RAG 优化方案相比，METIS 将生成延迟降低了 1.64 – 2.54 倍，而无需牺牲生成质量。

items.title: TickTock: Verified Isolation in a Production Embedded OS.
items.abstract: We present a case study formally verifying process isolation in the Tock production microcontroller OS kernel. Tock combines hardware memory protection units and language-level techniques—by writing the kernel in Rust—to enforce isolation between user and kernel code. Our effort to verify Tock's process abstraction unearthed multiple, subtle bugs that broke isolation—many allowing malicious applications to compromise the whole OS. We describe this effort and TickTock, our fork of the Tock operating system kernel that eliminates isolation bugs by construction. TickTock uses Flux, an SMT-based Rust verifier, to formally specify and verify process isolation for all ARMv7-M platforms Tock supports and for three RISC-V 32-bit platforms. Our verification-guided design and implementation led to a new, granular process abstraction that is simpler than Tock's, has formal security guarantees (that are verified in half a minute), and outperforms Tock on certain critical code paths.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个案例研究，正式验证 Tock 生产微控制器操作系统内核中的进程隔离。 Tock 将硬件内存保护单元和语言级技术相结合（通过用 Rust 编写内核）来强制用户和内核代码之间的隔离。我们验证 Tock 进程抽象的努力发现了多个破坏隔离的微妙错误，其中许多错误允许恶意应用程序危害整个操作系统。我们描述了这项工作和 TickTock，我们的 Tock 操作系统内核的分支，通过构造消除了隔离错误。 TickTock 使用 Flux（一种基于 SMT 的 Rust 验证器）来正式指定和验证 Tock 支持的所有 ARMv7-M 平台以及三个 RISC-V 32 位平台的进程隔离。我们以验证为导向的设计和实现带来了一种新的细粒度流程抽象，它比 Tock 更简单，具有正式的安全保证（半分钟内验证），并且在某些关键代码路径上优于 Tock。

items.title: Tock: From Research To Securing 10 Million Computers.
Tempo: Compiled Dynamic Deep Learning with Symbolic Dependence Graphs.
items.abstract: Deep learning (DL) algorithms are often defined in terms of temporal relationships: a tensor at one timestep may depend on tensors from earlier or later timesteps. Such dynamic dependencies (and corresponding dynamic tensor shapes) are difficult to express and optimize: while eager DL systems support such dynamism, they cannot apply compiler-based optimizations; graph-based systems require static tensor shapes, which forces users to pad tensors or break-up programs into multiple static graphs. We describe Tempo, a new DL system that combines the dynamism of eager execution with the whole-program optimizations of graph-based compilation. Tempo achieves this through a declarative programming model with recurrent tensors, which include explicit temporal dimensions. Temporal dimensions can be indexed using symbolic expressions to express dynamic dependencies on past and future tensors. Based on this, Tempo constructs a symbolic dependence graph, which concisely encodes dynamic dependencies between operators, and applies whole-program optimizations, such as algebraic simplifications, vectorization, tiling, and fusion. By tiling dynamic dependencies into static-size blocks, Tempo can also reuse existing static code-generators. It then uses a polyhedral model to find a feasible execution schedule, which includes memory management operations. We show that Tempo achieves a 7$\times$ speedup over JAX for Llama-3.2-3B decoding; for reinforcement learning algorithms, Tempo achieves a 54$\times$ speedup, with 16$\times$ lower peak memory usage.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 算法通常根据时间关系来定义：一个时间步长的张量可能取决于较早或较晚时间步长的张量。这种动态依赖关系（以及相应的动态张量形状）很难表达和优化：虽然急切的深度学习系统支持这种动态性，但它们无法应用基于编译器的优化；基于图的系统需要静态张量形状，这迫使用户将张量或分解程序填充到多个静态图中。我们描述了 Tempo，这是一种新的深度学习系统，它将急切执行的活力与基于图的编译的整个程序优化相结合。 Tempo 通过具有循环张量的声明性编程模型来实现这一点，其中包括显式的时间维度。可以使用符号表达式对时间维度进行索引，以表达对过去和未来张量的动态依赖关系。在此基础上，Tempo 构建了符号依赖图，简洁地编码了算子之间的动态依赖关系，并应用了整个程序的优化，例如代数简化、向量化、平铺和融合。通过将动态依赖项平铺到静态大小的块中，Tempo 还可以重用现有的静态代码生成器。然后，它使用多面体模型来找到可行的执行计划，其中包括内存管理操作。我们证明 Tempo 在 Llama-3.2-3B 解码方面比 JAX 实现了 7$\times$ 的加速；对于强化学习算法，Tempo 实现了 54$\times$ 的加速，同时峰值内存使用量降低了 16$\times$。

items.title: Loom: Efficient Capture and Querying of High-Frequency Telemetry.
Sailor: Automating Distributed Training over Dynamic, Heterogeneous, and Geo-distributed Clusters.
items.abstract: The high GPU demand of ML training makes it hard to allocate large homogeneous clusters of high-end GPUs in a single availability zone. Leveraging heterogeneous GPUs available within and across zones can improve throughput at a reasonable cost. However, training ML models on heterogeneous resources introduces significant challenges, such as stragglers and a large search space of possible job configurations. Current systems lack support for efficiently training models on heterogeneous resources. We present Sailor, a system that automates distributed training over heterogeneous, geo-distributed, and dynamically available resources. Sailor combines an efficient search space exploration algorithm, accurate runtime and memory footprint simulation, and a distributed training framework that supports different types of heterogeneity to optimize training throughput and cost.
items.abstract_zh: ML 训练对 GPU 的高需求使得很难在单个可用区中分配大型同质高端 GPU 集群。利用区域内和跨区域可用的异构 GPU 可以以合理的成本提高吞吐量。然而，在异构资源上训练 ML 模型会带来重大挑战，例如落后者和可能作业配置的巨大搜索空间。当前的系统缺乏对异构资源上有效训练模型的支持。我们推出了 Sailor，这是一个通过异构、地理分布式和动态可用资源自动进行分布式训练的系统。 Sailor 结合了高效的搜索空间探索算法、精确的运行时和内存占用模拟以及支持不同类型异构性的分布式训练框架，以优化训练吞吐量和成本。

items.title: COpter: Efficient Large-Scale Resource-Allocation via Continual Optimization.
items.abstract: Optimization-based resource allocation in large-scale systems often must trade-off responsiveness and allocation quality. Generally, allocations are reconsidered every few minutes (a round) by formulating and solving a new optimization problem. This paper introduces continual optimization, which reframes round-based resource allocation as a sequence of interconnected problems, leveraging the observation that these resource allocation problems often only change by small amounts across successive rounds to reduce solving times. COpter provides a method for continual optimization of Linear Programs (LP) and Mixed Integer Linear Programs (MILP) formulations of resource allocation problems by combining three innovations: (1) an efficient-to-update problem representation for incremental changes, (2) a proximal-point method implementation that can provably benefit from prior computational effort and allocations, and (3) lightweight heuristics for mixed-integer problems that recover feasible integer solutions with negligible quality loss. We evaluate COpter on problems in three domains: GPU cluster scheduling, shard load balancing, and WAN traffic engineering. Overall, we find that COpter finds high-quality solutions while reducing solver runtimes by 57–83× compared to state-of-the-art commercial solvers. Compared to problem partitioning approaches (POP), COpter simultaneously improves allocation quality and reduces end-to-end allocator runtimes by 1.5–30×.
items.abstract_zh: 大型系统中基于优化的资源分配通常必须权衡响应能力和分配质量。一般来说，每隔几分钟（一轮）就会通过制定和解决新的优化问题来重新考虑分配。本文介绍了持续优化，它将基于轮次的资源分配重新构建为一系列相互关联的问题，利用这些资源分配问题通常在连续轮次中仅发生少量变化的观察结果来减少求解时间。 COpter 通过结合三项创新，提供了一种持续优化资源分配问题的线性规划 (LP) 和混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式的方法：(1) 针对增量变化的高效更新问题表示，(2) 可以证明从先前的计算工作和分配中受益的近点方法实现，以及 (3) 针对混合整数问题的轻量级启发式方法，可以在质量损失可忽略不计的情况下恢复可行的整数解。我们针对三个领域的问题评估 COpter：GPU 集群调度、分片负载均衡和 WAN 流量工程。总的来说，我们发现 COpter 找到了高质量的解决方案，同时与最先进的商业求解器相比，求解器运行时间减少了 57-83 倍。与问题划分方法 (POP) 相比，COpter 同时提高了分配质量，并将端到端分配器运行时间缩短了 1.5-30 倍。

items.title: Prove It to the Kernel: Precise Extension Analysis via Proof-Guided Abstraction Refinement.
items.abstract: Modern OS kernels, such as Linux, employ the eBPF subsystem to enable user space to extend kernel functionality. To ensure safety, an in-kernel verifier statically analyzes these extensions; however, its imprecise analysis frequently results in the erroneous rejection of safe extensions, exposing a critical tension between the precision and computational complexity of the verifier that limits kernel extensibility.
items.abstract_zh: 现代操作系统内核（例如 Linux）采用 eBPF 子系统来使用户空间能够扩展内核功能。为了确保安全，内核验证器对这些扩展进行静态分析；然而，其不精确的分析经常导致错误地拒绝安全扩展，暴露了验证器的精度和计算复杂性之间的关键张力，从而限制了内核的可扩展性。

items.title: Pesto: Cooking up High Performance BFT Queries.
items.abstract: This paper presents Pesto, a high-performance Byzantine Fault Tolerant (BFT) database that offers full SQL compatibility. Pesto intentionally forgoes the use of State Machine Replication (SMR); SMR-based designs offer poor performance due to the several round trips required to order transactions. Pesto, instead, allows for replicas to remain inconsistent, and only synchronizes on demand to ensure that the database remain serializable in the presence of concurrent transactions and malicious actors. On TPC-C, Pesto matches the throughput of Peloton [20] and Postgres [21], two unreplicated SQL database systems, while increasing throughput by 2.3x compared to classic SMR-based BFT-architectures, and reducing latency by 2.7x to 3.9x. Pesto's leaderless design minimizes the impact of replica failures and ensures robust performance.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Pesto，这是一种高性能拜占庭容错 (BFT) 数据库，提供完全的 SQL 兼容性。 Pesto 有意放弃使用状态机复制 (SMR)；由于排序事务需要多次往返，基于 SMR 的设计性能较差。相反，Pesto 允许副本保持不一致，并且仅按需同步，以确保数据库在存在并发事务和恶意行为者的情况下保持可序列化。在 TPC-C 上，Pesto 与 Peloton [20] 和 Postgres [21] 这两个非复制 SQL 数据库系统的吞吐量相匹配，同时与经典的基于 SMR 的 BFT 架构相比，吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍，并将延迟降低了 2.7 倍到 3.9 倍。 Pesto 的无领导者设计最大限度地减少了副本故障的影响并确保了稳健的性能。

items.title: Robust LLM Training Infrastructure at ByteDance.
items.abstract: The training scale of large language models (LLMs) has reached tens of thousands of GPUs and is still continuously expanding, enabling faster learning of larger models. Accompanying the expansion of the resource scale is the prevalence of failures (CUDA error, NaN values, job hang, etc.), which poses significant challenges to training stability. Any large-scale LLM training infrastructure should strive for minimal training interruption, efficient fault diagnosis, and effective failure tolerance to enable highly efficient continuous training. This paper presents ByteRobust, a large-scale GPU infrastructure management system tailored for robust and stable training of LLMs. It exploits the uniqueness of LLM training process and gives top priorities to detecting and recovering failures in a routine manner. Leveraging parallelisms and characteristics of LLM training, ByteRobust enables high-capacity fault tolerance, prompt fault demarcation, and localization with an effective data-driven approach, comprehensively ensuring continuous and efficient training of LLM tasks. ByteRobust is deployed on a production GPU platform with over 200,000 GPUs and advances the state of the art in training robustness by achieving 97% ETTR for a three-month training job on 9,600 GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的训练规模已达到数万个 GPU，并且仍在不断扩大，从而能够更快地学习更大的模型。伴随资源规模的扩大，故障（CUDA错误、NaN值、作业挂起等）普遍存在，这对训练稳定性提出了重大挑战。任何大规模的LLM培训基础设施都应该努力实现最小的培训中断、高效的故障诊断和有效的容错，以实现高效的连续培训。本文介绍了 ByteRobust，这是一种专为法学硕士的鲁棒和稳定训练而定制的大规模 GPU 基础设施管理系统。它利用了法学硕士培训过程的独特性，并将以常规方式检测和恢复故障作为首要任务。 ByteRobust利用LLM训练的并行性和特点，通过有效的数据驱动方法实现大容量容错、快速故障定界和定位，全面保障LLM任务训练的持续高效。 ByteRobust 部署在拥有超过 200,000 个 GPU 的生产 GPU 平台上，通过在 9,600 个 GPU 上进行为期三个月的训练作业实现 97% 的 ETTR，从而提高了训练稳健性的最先进水平。

items.title: PhoenixOS: Concurrent OS-level GPU Checkpoint and Restore with Validated Speculation.
items.abstract: PhoenixOS (PhOS) is the first OS service that can concurrently checkpoint and restore (C/R) GPU processes—a fundamental capability for critical tasks such as fault tolerance, process migration, and fast startup. While concurrent C/R is well-established on CPUs, it poses unique challenges on GPUs due to their lack of essential features for efficiently tracing concurrent memory reads and writes, such as specific hardware capabilities (e.g., dirty bits) and OS-mediated data paths (e.g., copy-on-write).
items.abstract_zh: PhoenixOS (PhOS) 是第一个可以同时检查点和恢复 (C/R) GPU 进程的操作系统服务，这是容错、进程迁移和快速启动等关键任务的基本功能。虽然并发 C/R 在 CPU 上已经很成熟，但它对 GPU 提出了独特的挑战，因为它们缺乏有效跟踪并发内存读写的基本功能，例如特定的硬件功能（例如脏位）和操作系统介导的数据路径（例如写入时复制）。

items.title: Aegaeon: Effective GPU Pooling for Concurrent LLM Serving on the Market.
KNighter: Transforming Static Analysis with LLM-Synthesized Checkers.
SAND: A New Programming Abstraction for Video-based Deep Learning.
items.abstract: Video-based deep learning (VDL) is increasingly used across diverse applications and has become highly popular, but it faces significant challenges in preprocessing highly compressed video data. Preprocessing pipelines are complex, requiring extensive engineering effort, and introduce computational bottlenecks, with latency exceeding GPU training time. Existing solutions partially mitigate these issues but remain inefficient and resource-constrained.
items.abstract_zh: 基于视频的深度学习（VDL）越来越多地在各种应用中使用，并且变得非常流行，但它在预处理高度压缩的视频数据方面面临着巨大的挑战。预处理管道很复杂，需要大量的工程工作，并且会引入计算瓶颈，延迟超过 GPU 训练时间。现有的解决方案部分缓解了这些问题，但仍然效率低下且资源有限。

items.title: IC-Cache: Efficient Large Language Model Serving via In-context Caching.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in various applications, yet serving them at scale is challenging due to their substantial resource demands and high latency. Our real-world studies reveal that over 70% of user requests to LLMs have semantically similar counterparts, suggesting the potential for knowledge transfer among requests. However, naively caching and reusing past responses leads to a big quality drop.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在各种应用程序中表现出色，但由于其大量的资源需求和高延迟，大规模为其提供服务具有挑战性。我们的现实世界研究表明，超过 70% 的 LLM 用户请求具有语义相似的对应项，这表明请求之间存在知识转移的潜力。然而，天真地缓存和重用过去的响应会导致质量大幅下降。

items.title: Quilt: Resource-aware Merging of Serverless Workflows.
items.abstract: This paper describes Quilt, a serverless optimizer that automatically merges workflows that consist of many functions (possibly in different languages) into one process thereby avoiding high invocation latency, communication overhead, and long chains of cold starts. Instead of merging all functions, Quilt takes into account the provider's resource constraints to decide which functions to merge. Quilt is compatible with existing platforms without modification (Fission, OpenWhisk, and OpenFaaS), can merge functions in different languages (C, C++, Swift, Go, Rust) by acting at the level of LLVM IR, and requires no input or help from developers. Our evaluation shows that Quilt improves median workflow completion time by 45.63%–70.95% and throughput by 2.05×–12.87×.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Quilt，一种无服务器优化器，它自动将由许多函数（可能采用不同语言）组成的工作流合并到一个进程中，从而避免高调用延迟、通信开销和长冷启动链。 Quilt 不是合并所有函数，而是考虑提供者的资源限制来决定合并哪些函数。 Quilt 无需修改即可兼容现有平台（Fission、OpenWhisk 和 OpenFaaS），可以通过作用于 LLVM IR 级别来合并不同语言（C、C++、Swift、Go、Rust）的功能，并且不需要开发人员的输入或帮助。我们的评估表明，Quilt 将工作流程中值完成时间提高了 45.63%–70.95%，吞吐量提高了 2.05×–12.87×。

items.title: Jenga: Effective Memory Management for Serving LLM with Heterogeneity.
DiffKV: Differentiated Memory Management for Large Language Models with Parallel KV Compaction.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities but face substantial serving costs due to their high memory demands, with the key-value (KV) cache being a primary bottleneck. State-of-the-art KV cache compression techniques, such as quantization and pruning, apply uniform treatment to both keys and values, and discard unimportant tokens entirely, overlooking the fine-grained distinctions in the significance of individual KV cache components. To address such limitations, we introduce DiffKV, a novel framework for efficient KV cache compression that exploits three levels of differentiation in the KV cache: (1) the differing impact of keys and values on attention computation, (2) the varying importance of tokens, and (3) the diverse dynamic sparsity patterns across attention heads. These levels of differentiation introduce irregular memory usage patterns across different requests and attention heads, posing significant scalability challenges for memory management. To address these challenges, DiffKV proposes an on-GPU memory manager that compacts fragmented free memory list into contiguous regions in parallel, effectively translating sparsity in the KV cache into performance gains. We evaluate DiffKV on several mainstream LLMs, including the emerging thinking models that generate extended chains of thought. DiffKV is able to compress the KV cache by 2.7× to 5.7× with near-lossless accuracy on complex workloads requiring sophisticated reasoning and long-generation capabilities, and enhances throughput by 1.9× to 5.4×.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 展示了卓越的功能，但由于其高内存需求而面临巨大的服务成本，其中键值 (KV) 缓存是主要瓶颈。最先进的 KV 缓存压缩技术，例如量化和剪枝，对键和值进行统一处理，并完全丢弃不重要的标记，忽略了各个 KV 缓存组件重要性的细粒度区别。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 DiffKV，这是一种高效 KV 缓存压缩的新颖框架，它利用 KV 缓存中的三个级别的差异：（1）键和值对注意力计算的不同影响，（2）令牌的不同重要性，以及（3）注意力头之间的不同动态稀疏模式。这些级别的差异在不同的请求和注意力头中引入了不规则的内存使用模式，给内存管理带来了重大的可扩展性挑战。为了应对这些挑战，DiffKV 提出了一种 GPU 内存管理器，它将碎片化的空闲内存列表并行压缩到连续区域，有效地将 KV 缓存中的稀疏性转化为性能增益。我们在几个主流法学硕士上评估了 DiffKV，包括产生扩展思维链的新兴思维模型。 DiffKV 能够在需要复杂推理和长生成能力的复杂工作负载上以近乎无损的精度将 KV 缓存压缩 2.7 倍至 5.7 倍，并将吞吐量提高 1.9 倍至 5.4 倍。

items.title: CortenMM: Efficient Memory Management with Strong Correctness Guarantees.
items.abstract: Modern memory management systems suffer from poor performance and subtle concurrency bugs, slowing down applications while introducing security vulnerabilities. We observe that both issues stem from the conventional design of memory management systems with two levels of abstraction: a software-level abstraction (e.g., VMA trees in Linux) and a hardware-level abstraction (typically, page tables). This design increases portability but requires correctly and efficiently synchronizing two drastically different and complex data structures, which is generally challenging.
items.abstract_zh: 现代内存管理系统存在性能差和微妙的并发错误，降低了应用程序的速度，同时引入了安全漏洞。我们观察到这两个问题都源于具有两个抽象级别的内存管理系统的传统设计：软件级抽象（例如 Linux 中的 VMA 树）和硬件级抽象（通常是页表）。这种设计提高了可移植性，但需要正确有效地同步两个截然不同且复杂的数据结构，这通常具有挑战性。

items.title: AutoMan: Facilitating Verified Distributed Systems Development Through Automatic Code Generation and Manual Optimizations.
Oasis: Pooling PCIe Devices Over CXL to Boost Utilization.
items.abstract: PCIe devices, such as NICs and SSDs, are frequently underutilized in cloud platforms. PCIe device pools, in which multiple hosts can share a set of PCIe devices, could increase PCIe device utilization and reduce their total cost of ownership. The main way to achieve PCIe device pools today is via PCIe switches, but they are expensive and inflexible. We design Oasis,1 a system that pools PCIe devices in software over CXL memory pools. CXL memory pools are already being deployed to boost datacenter memory utilization and reduce costs. Once CXL pools are in place, they can serve as an efficient data path between hosts and PCIe devices. Oasis provides a control plane and datapath over CXL pools, mapping and routing PCIe device traffic across host boundaries. PCIe devices with different functionalities can be supported by adding an Oasis engine for each device class. We implement an Oasis network engine to demonstrate NIC pooling. Our evaluation shows that Oasis improves the NIC utilization by 2× and handles NIC failover with only a 38 ms interruption.
items.abstract_zh: PCIe 设备（例如 NIC 和 SSD）在云平台中经常未得到充分利用。 PCIe 设备池（其中多个主机可以共享一组 PCIe 设备）可以提高 PCIe 设备利用率并降低总体拥有成本。目前实现 PCIe 设备池的主要方式是通过 PCIe 交换机，但它们价格昂贵且不灵活。我们设计了 Oasis，1 一个通过 CXL 内存池在软件中汇集 PCIe 设备的系统。 CXL 内存池已被部署，以提高数据中心内存利用率并降低成本。一旦 CXL 池就位，它们就可以充当主机和 PCIe 设备之间的高效数据路径。 Oasis 在 CXL 池上提供控制平面和数据路径，跨主机边界映射和路由 PCIe 设备流量。通过为每个设备类别添加 Oasis 引擎，可以支持具有不同功能的 PCIe 设备。我们实现了 Oasis 网络引擎来演示 NIC 池。我们的评估表明，Oasis 将 NIC 利用率提高了 2 倍，并且处理 NIC 故障转移时仅出现 38 毫秒的中断。

items.title: Sleeping with One Eye Open: Fast, Sustainable Storage with Sandman.
items.abstract: All-flash servers, while being widely popular for their high performance and large capacity, can incur significant energy consumption in modern storage systems. Through a motivational study, we discover that the culprit is the inefficiency in the software stack, and existing power-saving methods fail to deliver comparable performance, especially under workload bursts. Guided by the lessons learned, we propose Sandman, a scheduling framework that combines the fast resource scaling mechanism, resource monitoring, and I/O burst detection policies. Experiments show that Sandman reduces average power consumption by up to 39.38% and energy consumption by up to 33.36% while delivering performance comparable (within 5% in corner cases) to the best performance case (the busy-polling stack) in both benchmarks and field workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 全闪存服务器虽然因其高性能和大容量而广受欢迎，但在现代存储系统中也会产生大量的能源消耗。通过动机研究，我们发现罪魁祸首是软件堆栈的低效率，而现有的节能方法无法提供可比的性能，尤其是在工作负载突发的情况下。在经验教训的指导下，我们提出了Sandman，一个结合了快速资源扩展机制、资源监控和I/O突发检测策略的调度框架。实验表明，Sandman 将平均功耗降低了 39.38%，能耗降低了 33.36%，同时在基准测试和现场工作负载中提供了与最佳性能情况（繁忙轮询堆栈）相当的性能（在极端情况下在 5% 以内）。

items.title: cache_ext: Customizing the Page Cache with eBPF.
